home.subtitle: Experience the perfect blend of simplicity and power. Manage tasks, collaborate with teams, and achieve your goals with elegance.

task.title: Smart Task Management
task.description: Create, organize, and prioritize your tasks with an intuitive drag-and-drop interface. Set deadlines, add descriptions, and track progress effortlessly.

team.title: Team Collaboration
team.description: Invite team members, assign roles, and work together seamlessly. Real-time updates keep everyone in sync and productive.

project.title: Project Organization
project.description: Group related tasks into beautiful projects with custom colors, descriptions, and detailed progress tracking for better visibility.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Monitor your progress with comprehensive stats, visual charts, and detailed activity logs. Make data-driven decisions with confidence.

files.title: File Attachments
files.description: Attach documents, images, and files directly to your tasks. Keep all relevant information organized in one central location.

workflow.title: Flexible Workflows
workflow.description: Customize task statuses, priority levels, and workflows to match your unique process. Adapt the platform to your needs, not the other way around.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.description: Your data is encrypted and protected. We take security seriously so you can focus on your work with peace of mind.

design.title: Intuitive Design

available.title: Always Available
available.description: Access your tasks from anywhere, anytime. Cloud-based platform with 99.9% uptime guarantee.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Taskora

q1.question: Is Taskora really free?
q1.answer: Yes! Taskora offers a generous free forever plan that includes all core features. You can create unlimited tasks and projects, collaborate with your team, and enjoy the full experience without any time limits or credit card requirements.

q2.question: Can I use Taskora for team collaboration?
q2.answer: Absolutely! Taskora is designed for both individuals and teams. You can invite team members to your projects, assign tasks, set different permission levels, and track everyone's progress in real-time. Communication and collaboration are at the heart of what we do.

q3.question: How secure is my data?
q3.answer: Security is our top priority. All data is encrypted both in transit and at rest. We use industry-standard security protocols, perform regular security audits, and comply with international data protection regulations. Your information is safe with us.

q4.question: Can I access Taskora on mobile devices?
q4.answer: Yes! Taskora is fully responsive and works beautifully on all devices - desktop, tablet, and mobile. Access your tasks on the go, update progress from anywhere, and stay productive whether you're at your desk or on the move.

q5.question: Do I need technical knowledge to use Taskora?
q5.answer: Not at all! Taskora is designed to be incredibly intuitive and user-friendly. If you can use email, you can use Taskora. Our clean interface and logical workflows make it easy for anyone to get started within minutes, no training required.
